title: Bubbles and Arcs in NGC 2359
cosmicFact: NGC 2359有个更形象的名字叫「雷神之盔」。
singleNarrativeSeed: NGC 2359有个更形象的名字叫「雷神之盔」。在巨犬座方向，一颗沃尔夫-拉叶星把自己的外壳吹成了头盔的形状。被它选中的人也许有一种「战士」的气质——不是为了战斗，而是为了保护某些值得保护的东西。雷神之盔的中心恒星质量是太阳的十几倍，表面温度高达十万度。你的温度也不在表面。

cosmicFactEn: NGC 2359 has a more vivid name called "Thor's Helmet".
singleNarrativeSeedEn: NGC 2359 has a more vivid name called "Thor's Helmet". In the direction of Canis Major, a Wolf-Rayet star has blown its shell into the shape of a helmet. Those chosen by it may have a "warrior" quality - not to fight, but to protect something worth protecting. The central star of Thor's Helm is more than ten times more massive than the sun, and its surface temperature reaches as high as 100,000 degrees. Your temperature is not on the surface either.

title: Eagle Castle
cosmicFact: 「鹰堡」——鹰状星云深处一片被侵蚀的柱状结构，被哈勃望远镜拍成宇宙中最著名的照片之一。
singleNarrativeSeed: 「鹰堡」——鹰状星云深处一片被侵蚀的柱状结构，被哈勃望远镜拍成宇宙中最著名的照片之一。它不是城堡，只是正在被恒星辐射缓慢雕刻的分子云。被它选中的人也许正在被某种力量雕刻——不一定是痛苦，是一种重塑。鹰堡之所以美，恰恰是因为它正在被改变。变化本身就是一种美学。

cosmicFactEn: "Eagle Castle" - an eroded columnar structure deep in the Eagle Nebula, was captured by the Hubble Telescope into one of the most famous photos in the universe.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: "Eagle Castle" - an eroded columnar structure deep in the Eagle Nebula, was captured by the Hubble Telescope into one of the most famous photos in the universe. It's not a castle, just a molecular cloud being slowly carved by stellar radiation. The person chosen by it may be being carved by some kind of force - not necessarily pain, but a kind of reshaping. Eagle Fort is beautiful precisely because it is being changed. Change itself is an aesthetic.

title: The Rosette Nebula
cosmicFact: 情人节这天的玫瑰星云——130光年宽的一朵星际之花。
singleNarrativeSeed: 情人节这天的玫瑰星云——130光年宽的一朵星际之花。它不是浪漫的象征，它是恒星的产房，正在剧烈地制造新的太阳。被它选中的人也许被误解过——别人以为你浪漫，其实你只是在认真地「创造」。玫瑰星云不需要情人节，它每天都在开。你也不需要特定的日子来证明自己的价值。

cosmicFactEn: The Rosette Nebula on Valentine's Day - an interstellar flower 130 light-years across.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: The Rosette Nebula on Valentine's Day - an interstellar flower 130 light-years across. It is not a symbol of romance, it is the birth house of stars, violently making new suns. The person chosen by it may have been misunderstood - others think you are romantic, but in fact you are just "creating" seriously. The Rosette Nebula doesn't need Valentine's Day, it blooms every day. You also don't need a specific day to prove your worth.

title: M8: The Lagoon Nebula
cosmicFact: 礁湖星云的另一个角度——这一次它展示了名字里那片「潟湖」：星云中心一条暗色的尘埃带。
singleNarrativeSeed: 礁湖星云的另一个角度——这一次它展示了名字里那片「潟湖」：星云中心一条暗色的尘埃带。5000光年外，100光年跨度，里面藏着被尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成区。被它选中的人也许有某种「暗面」——不是负面，是不愿意展示的部分。礁湖星云用那条暗带证明：看不见的部分，才是最有故事的。

cosmicFactEn: Another angle of the Lagoon Nebula - this time showing the "lagoon" of its name: a dark dust lane at the Nebula's center.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: Another angle of the Lagoon Nebula - this time showing the "lagoon" of its name: a dark dust lane at the Nebula's center. 5,000 light-years away and 100 light-years across, there is a star-forming region obscured by dust. title: The Rosette Nebula in Hydrogen, Oxygen, and Sulfur

cosmicFact: 玫瑰星云中心的疏散星团——一群只有几百万年历史的年轻蓝色恒星。

title: The Rosette Nebula
cosmicFact: 情人节另一天，情人节另一个天体——也许宇宙也觉得这个日子需要被认真对待。
singleNarrativeSeed: 情人节另一天，情人节另一个天体——也许宇宙也觉得这个日子需要被认真对待。被这天选中的人也许对「连接」这件事有特别的感知。你不需要每天都感受到连接，但某些特定的时刻，你会突然觉得某个遥远的人就在身边。宇宙不关心情人节，但宇宙里确实有一些东西会让两个遥远的生命在同一时刻看向同一片天。

title: The Lagoon Nebula in Three Colors
titleShort: The Lagoon Nebula in Three Colors
cosmicFact: 公元1054年7月4日，一颗超新星在金牛座方向爆发，中国宋朝的天文官称它为「天关客星」。
singleNarrativeSeed: 公元1054年7月4日，一颗超新星在金牛座方向爆发，中国宋朝的天文官称它为「天关客星」。将近一千年后，那场爆炸的遗迹被命名为蟹状星云——而算法说，它属于你。被它选中的人，大概都懂一件事：真正有力量的东西，往往诞生于某次崩塌。蟹状星云的中心有一颗脉冲星，以每秒30次的频率旋转——那是整个星云的心跳。无论外面的世界怎么变，你的核心频率，从来没变过。

cosmicFactEn: On July 4, 1054 AD, a supernova exploded in the direction of Taurus. The astronomers of the Song Dynasty of China called it the "Tianguan Guest Star."
singleNarrativeSeedEn: On July 4, 1054 AD, a supernova exploded in the direction of Taurus. The astronomers of the Song Dynasty of China called it the "Tianguan Guest Star." Nearly a thousand years later, the remnant of that explosion is named the Crab Nebula—and the algorithm says it belongs to you. Those chosen by it probably know one thing: truly powerful things are often born from a certain collapse. There is a pulsar at the center of the Crab Nebula, rotating at a frequency of 30 times per second—the heartbeat of the entire Nebula. No matter how the outside world changes, your core frequency has never changed.

title: A Crescent Nebula Star Field
cosmicFact: 「新月星云」——一颗沃尔夫-拉叶星临终前呼出的最后一口气。
singleNarrativeSeed: 「新月星云」——一颗沃尔夫-拉叶星临终前呼出的最后一口气。4700光年外，天鹅座方向，一颗即将爆炸的巨星正在以每秒2000公里的速度抛出自己的外壳，在太空中画出一弯新月。被它选中的人骨子里有一种对「结局」的坦然。你知道有些东西会结束，但你不会因为害怕结局就不全力以赴。新月星云的中心恒星还有不到一百万年就会爆炸——但此刻它比周围任何恒星都亮。活在倒计时里，有些人会恐惧，而你会燃烧得更用力。

cosmicFactEn: "Crescent Nebula" - the last breath exhaled by a Wolf-Rayet star before it died.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: "Crescent Nebula" - the last breath exhaled by a Wolf-Rayet star before it died. 4,700 light-years away, in the direction of Cygnus, a giant star about to explode is ejecting its shell at a speed of 2,000 kilometers per second, drawing a crescent moon in space. The people chosen by it have a kind of calmness about the "end" in their bones. You know something is going to end, but you don't stop giving it your all just because you're afraid of the ending. The central star of the Crescent Nebula is less than a million years away from exploding—but right now it's brighter than any surrounding star. Living in a countdown, some people will be afraid, but you will burn harder.

cosmicFact: 锥形星云区域——包括神秘的锥形暗云、蓝色的反射星云、还有橙色的氢气辉光。

title: The Helix Nebula from Blanco and Hubble
titleShort: The Helix Nebula from Blanco and Hubble
titleCn: 来自布兰科和哈勃的螺旋星云
cosmicFact: 「上帝之眼」再次出现在你的星图上。
singleNarrativeSeed: 「上帝之眼」再次出现在你的星图上。这一次它离得更近——它是距离地球最近的大型星云之一，只有650光年。近到你几乎能感受到它在看着你。螺旋星云的外环里散布着数千个被称为「彗星结」的小气团，每一个都有太阳系那么大——被一颗将死恒星的紫外线照亮。你也许也是那种「被某种光照到就会发亮」的人。你不需要自己成为光源，只需要找到那个能照亮你的东西。然后你就会比任何人都耀眼。

cosmicFactEn: The "Eye of God" appears again in your chart.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: The "Eye of God" appears again in your chart. This time it's even closer - it's one of the closest large Nebulae to Earth, only 650 light-years away. So close you can almost feel it looking at you. The outer ring of the Helix Nebula is dotted with thousands of small gas clumps called "cometary knots," each as large as the solar system - illuminated by the ultraviolet light of a dying star. You may also be the kind of person who "illuminates when exposed to a certain kind of light." You don't need to be the source of light, you just need to find something that lights you up. Then you will shine brighter than anyone else.

title: M27: The Dumbbell Nebula
cosmicFact: 船底座大星云的「南柱」——一根被恒星辐射雕刻了数十万年的气体柱。
singleNarrativeSeed: 船底座大星云的「南柱」——一根被恒星辐射雕刻了数十万年的气体柱。它正在被侵蚀，形状每天都在变化，但变化本身成了它最美的部分。被它选中的人也许正在经历某种重塑。你正在被生活雕刻——压力、期待、环境都在你身上留下痕迹。但你要知道，船底座南柱之所以美，恰恰是因为那些被削去的部分。你不需要对抗所有的侵蚀，有些侵蚀会让你变成更好的形状。

cosmicFactEn: The "Southern Pillar" of the Great Carina Nebula - a pillar of gas carved by stellar radiation over hundreds of thousands of years.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: The "Southern Pillar" of the Great Carina Nebula - a pillar of gas carved by stellar radiation over hundreds of thousands of years. It is being eroded and its shape is changing every day, but the change itself becomes the most beautiful part of it. Those chosen by it may be undergoing some kind of reinvention. You are being carved by life—stress, expectations, and circumstances are all leaving their mark on you. But you have to know that the beauty of the south column of Carina is precisely because of the parts that were cut away. You don't have to fight all erosion, some erosion will leave you in better shape.

title: The Busy Center of the Lagoon Nebula
titleShort: The Busy Center of the Lagoon Nebula
cosmicFact: 「吃豆人星云」——是的，它真的长得像吃豆人。

singleNarrativeSeedEn: The Crab Nebula appears in your match for the fourth time. Maybe it's time for you to listen carefully to what it has to say. It's the remnant of an explosion nearly a thousand years ago - but it's not a ruin, it's a source of radiation. Its energy output is 75,000 times that of the sun. People who are repeatedly selected by the Crab Nebula may have some resonance with the idea of ​​"drawing energy from destruction." The fragmentation you have experienced in the past has not made you weaker, but has turned you into a source of radiation - you do not need external energy, and you continue to shine. This is what the Crab Nebula teaches you.

title: Cat's Eye
cosmicFact: 「火焰星」——它不是真的在燃烧，而是一颗高速飞行的蓝色恒星，穿过一片星际气体时把周围的分子云照亮了。
singleNarrativeSeed: 「火焰星」——它不是真的在燃烧，而是一颗高速飞行的蓝色恒星，穿过一片星际气体时把周围的分子云照亮了。就像一颗子弹穿过雾气，留下一道燃烧的尾迹。被它选中的人身上有一种「走到哪里都会留下痕迹」的特质。你不需要刻意做什么，你的存在本身就会搅动周围的场。火焰星以每小时十万公里的速度飞行——它不会在任何地方停留太久，但经过的每一片空间都会记住它来过。

cosmicFactEn: "Flaming Star" - It is not really burning, but a blue star flying at high speed, illuminating the surrounding molecular cloud as it passes through a piece of interstellar gas.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: "Flaming Star" - It is not really burning, but a blue star flying at high speed, illuminating the surrounding molecular cloud as it passes through a piece of interstellar gas. Like a bullet passing through the fog, leaving a burning trail. The people chosen by it have a quality that "leaves traces wherever they go." You don't need to do anything deliberately, your presence itself will stir up the surrounding field. The Flaming Star flies at a speed of 100,000 kilometers per hour - it will not stay anywhere for too long, but every space it passes through will remember its presence.

singleNarrativeSeed: 礁湖星云的蓝色版本——氧离子发出的冷蓝色光。你见过它红色的样子，热烈而奔放。这一面是冷静的、克制的、深邃的。被它选中的人也许有一种「色温切换」的能力。你可以很热，也可以很冷，不是善变，是容量大。礁湖星云告诉我们：同一个天体可以有完全不同的颜色。你也是。

cosmicFact: 心脏星云——IC 1805，7500光年外的仙后座方向，一颗由发光氢气构成的巨大心脏。
singleNarrativeSeed: 心脏星云——IC 1805，7500光年外的仙后座方向，一颗由发光氢气构成的巨大心脏。它的中心是一个年轻的疏散星团，那些热星的辐射让整颗「心脏」持续跳动。被它选中的人可能有一颗比别人跳得更用力的心。不是心脏有问题——是你对世界的感受比别人强烈。心脏星云每时每刻都在失去气体，被自己的辐射吹散——但它还在发光。给太多不是你的弱点，是你的方式。

cosmicFactEn: Heart Nebula - IC 1805, a huge heart of glowing hydrogen gas 7,500 light-years away in the direction of the constellation Cassiopeia.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: Heart Nebula - IC 1805, a huge heart of glowing hydrogen gas 7,500 light-years away in the direction of the constellation Cassiopeia. At its center is a young open star cluster, and the radiation from those hot stars keeps the entire "heart" beating. The person chosen by it may have a heart that beats harder than others. It's not that there's something wrong with your heart - it's that you feel the world more strongly than others. The Heart Nebula is losing gas every moment, being blown away by its own radiation - but it's still glowing. Giving too much is not your weakness, it is your way.

title: The Great Carina Nebula

title: M42: The Great Nebula in Orion
cosmicFact: M42——又一次。

title: M27: The Dumbbell Nebula
cosmicFact: 哑铃星云最迷人的地方，是它看起来像被拉成两半，可两边的光偏偏还在彼此呼应。
singleNarrativeSeed: 哑铃星云最迷人的地方，是它看起来像被拉成两半，可两边的光偏偏还在彼此呼应。被它选中的人，往往身上也同时住着两种完全不同的自己：一个柔软，一个决绝；一个需要陪伴，一个又极度想保留空间。你不是矛盾，你只是比很多人更完整。真正成熟的人，早就学会和自己的两面握手。

cosmicFactEn: The most fascinating thing about the Dumbbell Nebula is that it looks like it's been pulled in half, but the light from both sides still echoes each other.
singleNarrativeSeedEn: The most fascinating thing about the Dumbbell Nebula is that it looks like it's been pulled in half, but the light from both sides still echoes each other. The people chosen by it often have two completely different selves living at the same time: one is soft and the other is decisive; one needs companionship and the other desperately wants to retain space. You are not a contradiction, you are just more complete than many people. A truly mature person has long since learned to shake hands with both sides of himself.
